paper_title: Extending the spaced analysis to acidities in the NEEM S1 core

methods.description: This method involves comparing the spacing intervals between bristlecone pine frost rings and ice acidities in the NEEM S1 core to identify patterns and associations with volcanic activity.

steps.description: Retrieve spacing intervals data from bristlecone pine frost rings and NEEM S1 core acidities.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch spacing intervals data from bristlecone pine and NEEM S1 core

steps.description: Compare the spacing intervals between frost-damaged rings in bristlecone pine and acidities in the NEEM S1 core.
steps.searchable_summary: compare spacing intervals between frost rings and NEEM S1 acidities

steps.description: Adjust the NEEM S1 acidity dates by moving them forward by an average of 7.04 years to achieve a coherent alignment with frost rings.
steps.searchable_summary: adjust NEEM S1 acidity dates by 7.04 years

steps.description: Analyze the adjusted data to identify which volcanoes correspond to frost rings and which are unassociated.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze adjusted data for volcano-frost ring associations
